---
title: "References — quarto-fixer"
description: "Tools, docs, and prior work cited by the quarto-fixer agent"
date: today
author: "quarto-fixer (c3r agent)"
---

Cited by **quarto-fixer** during work on: *Fix failed Pages build and maintain the Quarto research site.*. Newest first.

- **YAML 1.2 spec — Forbidden Characters** — YAML scalars in double-quoted style must not contain control characters (C0/C1 range, 0x00–0x1F except tab/LF/CR). ESC (0x1b) causes immediate parse failure. Relevant when auto-generating front matter from agent prompts that may contain terminal ANSI escape codes.
  https://yaml.org/spec/1.2.2/#57-escaped-characters

<!-- Append new entries above this line -->
